context.code: function Counter(){ const [count, setCount] = useState(0); return <button onClick={() => setCount(count + 1)}>{count}</button>; }

segments.text: 这里用 use state 维护 count
然后 set count 触发 render

context.code: type UserCardProps = { userName: string; onSelect(): void }; export function UserCard(props: UserCardProps){ return <button onClick={props.onSelect}>{props.userName}</button>; }
context.runtimeOutput: TypeError: props.onSelect is not a function

segments.text: 先定义 user card props 类型
这里 on select 要从 props 传进来
如果不是 function 就会报 type error

context.code: const canSeek = durationMs > 0; const label = isPlaying ? 'Pause playback' : 'Resume playback';

segments.text: 这里先判断 can seek 是否可用
Then we switch the label from pause playback to resume playback
这一段是回放控制条的状态切换
